results.justification: Cache-coherence protocol adapted to multi-agent artifact synchronization covers the timing-anchor + lazy-update mechanism of PARRANDA-PRIMERO.
5-sub-decision orchestration with role/turn-level credit covers the 2-agent role-pair coordination paradigm.
Multi-agent scale coordination with role separation covers the primero/segundo role-pair architecture.
Leader-follower coordination evaluation framework covers the primero-segundo lead-follow paradigm.
System-level + internal communication framework covers the shared anchor-stream + role separation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Stackelberg leader-follower decision-sequence paradigm IS the primero-segundo timing-anchor mechanism.
Preemptive scheduling for streaming covers the fixed-rate timing-anchor stream paradigm.
Comprehensive orchestration framework covers 2-agent role-pair coordination patterns.
